dashboard.slogan: Here's where you stand, your debt, today's prayers, and how far you've come.
dashboard.hero_focus_body: You have already completed {{prayers}} qadaa prayers and {{fasts}} qadaa fasting days. Keep today's step gentle and sustainable.
dashboard.hero_focus_complete: Your recorded debt is clear. Keep using the daily tracker to protect the consistency you built.
dashboard.salah_debt_subtitle: Lead with what you've completed, then open the remaining balance when you need the detail.
dashboard.encouragement_message: Small, sincere steps still count. Consistency builds momentum.
dashboard.card_todays_prayers_subtitle: Log today's prayers clearly, without mixing them with historical qadaa.
dashboard.card_sawm_subtitle: Track your missed Ramadan fasts with the same calm, visible progress.
dashboard.card_streak_subtitle: A weekly snapshot of your recent rhythm, not just your overall total.
dashboard.weekly_overview_hint: Check the Salah and Sawm pages for detailed progress.
dashboard.fasts_remaining_details: fasting days remaining on your journey
dashboard.projection_at_rate: At {{n}} per day, approximately {{years}} year(s) remain.
dashboard.projection_rate_positive: You are completing about {{n}} prayers per day.
dashboard.projection_detail: At {{n}} per day, approximately {{years}} year(s) remain.
dashboard.projection_almost_done: You are almost there. Keep going!
dashboard.streak_none: Log a prayer or fast to begin your streak
dashboard.celebration_fast_streak: You have fasted for {{n}} consecutive days
dashboard.record_mon_thu_streak_one: Monday & Thursday · {{n}} week in a row
dashboard.record_mon_thu_streak_other: Monday & Thursday · {{n}} weeks in a row
dashboard.record_obligatory_streak_one: All 5 prayers · {{n}} day in a row
dashboard.record_obligatory_streak_other: All 5 prayers · {{n}} days in a row
dashboard.debt_cleared_body: You have repaid all your Salah and Sawm debt. May Allah accept it from you.
dashboard.debt_cleared_continue: Keep using the daily tracker to stay consistent.
dashboard.check_in_body: It looks like your current practice period is still active. Did you complete any catch-up prayers while you were away?
dashboard.check_in_no_prior: Log any qadaa prayers you've caught up on recently

settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.privacy_note: Your data is stored in secure, access-controlled systems with encryption in transit and at rest, and is never shared. Only you can access your religious practice logs.
settings.delete_account_hint: Permanently deletes all your data. This cannot be undone.
settings.delete_confirm_text: This will permanently delete your date of birth, bulugh date, practicing periods, and all prayer and fasting logs. This action cannot be reversed.
settings.delete_partial_cleanup_notice: Your account data was deleted, but sign-in cleanup needs manual follow-up. You have been signed out for safety.
settings.profile_edit_hint: Updating your profile will recalculate your qadaa debt.
settings.username_placeholder: Enter a name you want Awdah to show
settings.username_hint: If left blank, Awdah will use your account email instead.
settings.bulugh_auto_hint: Use the 15-year scholarly default if you are unsure of the exact date.
settings.bulugh_auto_caption: Calculated as {{n}} Hijri years from your date of birth.
settings.bulugh_auto_unavailable: The default 15-year estimate is not available yet for this date of birth, so please enter your bulugh date manually.
settings.is_revert_label: I am a revert (convert to Islam)
settings.revert_bulugh_auto: Since you reverted after age 15, your puberty date is set to the scholarly default (15 Hijri years from date of birth).
settings.revert_bulugh_required: Since you reverted before age 15, please specify when you reached puberty.
settings.bulugh_late_warning: This is more than 15 years after your date of birth. The scholarly default is 15 years. Please verify this date is correct.
settings.bulugh_early_warning: This is under 12 years from your date of birth. While possible, early bulugh is uncommon. Please verify this date is correct.
settings.confirm_profile_change_body: Saving these changes will recalculate your qadaa debt. Your prayer and fasting logs will not be affected.
settings.periods_hint: Periods when you were consistently practicing. Gaps count toward your qadaa debt.
settings.periods_bulugh_hint: Dates are limited to on or after your date of birth. Update your profile to change this range.
settings.periods_empty_hint: Add the periods when you were consistently praying. Gaps between your bulugh date and these periods count toward your debt.
settings.select_start_first: Please select a start date first
settings.period_delete_confirm: Remove this practicing period? This will recalculate your debt.
settings.debt_preview_reduced: This change reduces your estimated salah qadaa by {{n}} prayers.
settings.debt_preview_increased: This change increases your estimated salah qadaa by {{n}} prayers.
settings.debt_preview_unchanged: This change keeps your estimated salah qadaa unchanged.
settings.export_reauth_hint: For security, re-enter your password before downloading a copy of your data.
settings.export_confirm_text: Enter your password to confirm the download.
settings.export_confirm_password: Enter your password to download your data
settings.export_retry_error: Your download is still being prepared. Please try again in a moment.
settings.privacy_note_gdpr: Under data protection laws, you can request a copy of your data or have it completely deleted.
settings.data_management_hint: Clear your logged records. Your profile, bulugh date, and practicing periods are kept.
settings.reset_prayers_hint: Removes all daily and qadaa prayer records. Your debt will revert to its original amount.
settings.reset_fasts_hint: Removes all qadaa fasting records. Your sawm debt will revert to its original amount.
settings.reset_confirm_prayers: This will permanently remove all your prayer logs. Are you sure?
settings.reset_confirm_fasts: This will permanently remove all your fasting logs. Are you sure?
settings.export_empty: No logs yet, so we downloaded an empty archive for you.
settings.export_success: Your data has been downloaded successfully.
settings.reset_empty_prayers: You don't have any prayer logs to clear. Your record is already empty.
settings.reset_empty_fasts: You don't have any fasting logs to clear. Your record is already empty.
settings.setup_reminder_title: Finish your setup for more accurate guidance
settings.setup_reminder_body: Open the setup steps to add your dates and practicing periods so Awdah can tailor your qadaa estimates, reminders, and history more accurately.

salah.subtitle: Track and fulfil your missed prayers
salah.daily_logger_hint: Tap a prayer to mark or unmark it
salah.period_note: Prayers during this period will be excluded from your qadaa total.
salah.all_complete: All prayers fulfilled. May Allah accept!
salah.all_complete_message: Alhamdulillah, you have no missed prayers to catch up on.
salah.qadaa_all_clear: Alhamdulillah, you are all caught up with your prayers!
salah.projection_prefix: At 5 per day, this will take approximately

salah.guidance_2: Tap any prayer name to mark it, then tap again to unmark it.
salah.guidance_3: Your debt balance updates immediately when you log a prayer.
salah.guidance_4: Every qadaa prayer, no matter how small, is a step forward.
salah.guidance_note: Scholars emphasise sincerity and consistency over speed. One prayer a day is valid and valued.
salah.before_birth_error: This date is before your date of birth. You cannot log prayers before you were born.
salah.hero_focus_body: You have already made up {{completed}} prayers. Keep each step gentle and sustainable.
salah.hero_focus_complete: Your salah debt is clear. Keep using the daily tracker to protect your consistency.
salah.encouragement: Every qadaa prayer, no matter how small, is a step forward. Consistency builds momentum.

sawm.title: Sawm Debt
sawm.subtitle: Track and fulfil your missed Ramadan fasts
sawm.daily_logger_hint: Tap to mark or unmark a fasting day
sawm.before_birth_error: This date is before your date of birth. You cannot log fasts before you were born.
sawm.all_complete: All fasting days fulfilled. May Allah accept!
sawm.projection_suffix: fasting days remaining on your journey
sawm.guidance_1: Tap the button to mark the selected day as a completed qadaa fast.
sawm.guidance_2: Navigate to previous days to log fasts you have already made up.
sawm.guidance_3: Your debt balance updates immediately when you log a fast.
sawm.guidance_note: One fasting day at a time is enough. Consistency matters more than speed.
sawm.daily_ramadan_only: Daily fasting is only tracked during Ramadan
sawm.non_ramadan_qadaa_hint: Outside Ramadan, use this tab to log your make-up fasts.
sawm.ramadan_qadaa_hint: During Ramadan, focus on your Ramadan fasts. Qadaa fasting is typically postponed until after Ramadan.
sawm.hero_focus_body: You have already made up {{completed}} fasting days. Keep each day gentle and sustainable.
sawm.hero_focus_complete: Your sawm debt is clear. Keep using the daily tracker to maintain your fasting consistency.
sawm.encouragement: One day of fasting at a time is enough. Consistency matters more than speed. May Allah accept your effort.

history.subtitle: A record of your logged prayers and fasts
history.no_entries_hint: Try adjusting your filters or log some prayers and fasts to see them here.
history.load_more_hint: History is loaded in smaller pages to keep the app responsive and reduce backend load.
history.load_more_empty_hint: No matching entries are visible yet. Load older pages to keep searching within this range.
history.range_limit_error: Please keep the selected history range within one year so the app stays fast and affordable to run.

marketing.badge: Built for a realistic qadaa journey
marketing.title: Awdah helps you return to Salah and Sawm with clarity and peace of mind.
marketing.subtitle: Track missed prayers and Ramadan fasts, calculate qadaa from your bulugh date and practicing periods, within a multilingual, Hijri-first experience.
marketing.feature_1_body: Qadaa is calculated from bulugh, gaps, practicing periods, and real Hijri dates, not from rough estimates.
marketing.feature_2_body: The app separates daily prayers from historical qadaa logs so usage remains logical and simple.
marketing.feature_3_body: Export your data, adjust your profile securely, and review a history that reflects both logs and covered practicing days.
marketing.panel_text: Sign in to your account or create a new one to begin your setup.
marketing.learn_panel_title: Review the calculation logic before signing in
marketing.learn_panel_body: Browse the scholarly notes, glossary, and privacy guidelines first, then create an account when you are ready to begin your journey.

about.project_subtitle: Why this app was built and the architecture that powers it.

not_found.title: Page not found

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.public_subtitle: How Awdah stores your live data, protects it, and handles backups.
privacy.intro_body: Awdah is built around privacy. We store only what the app needs to function, keep live data separate from recovery backups, and make deletion of live records clear and immediate.
privacy.how_stored_body: Active app data is stored encrypted at rest within AWS EU region (eu-west-1 Ireland). Data in transit is protected with HTTPS/TLS 1.3. Recovery backups are kept separately for operational resilience and retained for 30 days.
privacy.sharing_body: We do not sell your data, and we do not use advertising networks or data brokers. The app does not currently ship third-party analytics.
privacy.rights_body: You can access, correct, export, and delete the data we hold about you from Settings at any time. These rights apply to your live data. Recovery backups are retained for 30 days for operational resilience and are not separately accessible.
privacy.right_access: View your stored data in the app at any time
privacy.right_rectify: Correct your profile, practicing periods, and logs in Settings
privacy.right_delete: Delete your account and all associated data immediately and permanently
privacy.right_export: Export a copy of your data from Settings
privacy.cookies_body: We do not use third-party cookies for analytics or advertising. Sign-in state stays scoped to the active app session and is cleared when you sign out.
privacy.contact_body: For questions about this privacy policy or data handling, contact us via email at {{email}}. As a small operation, we do not have a designated Data Protection Officer, but we respond to all privacy inquiries promptly.

onboarding.privacy_subtitle: A few things before we start
onboarding.privacy_data_dob: Your date of birth (stored as Hijri)
onboarding.privacy_data_logs: Your daily prayer and fasting logs
onboarding.privacy_rights_text: You can export or delete all your data at any time from Settings.
onboarding.privacy_consent_data: I understand that Awdah stores my religious practice data in protected systems and never shares it with third parties.
onboarding.privacy_consent_policy: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy.
onboarding.profile_subtitle: Help us calculate your qadaa accurately
onboarding.dob_hint: Enter the date you were born
onboarding.dob_skip_hint: Optional. You can add this later in Settings.
onboarding.bulugh_subtitle: When did you reach the age of accountability?
onboarding.bulugh_explainer: Bulugh is the age of puberty. From this date, all 5 daily prayers and Ramadan fasts become obligatory upon you.
onboarding.revert_explainer: As a revert (convert) to Islam, your qadaa obligation begins from the date you accepted Islam, not from puberty.
onboarding.revert_bulugh_note: Your debt will be calculated from this date instead of the puberty date.
onboarding.bulugh_know_age: I remember my approximate age at bulugh
onboarding.bulugh_age_label: I was approximately this old at bulugh
onboarding.bulugh_age_error_invalid: Please enter a valid age between 1 and 70
onboarding.bulugh_calculated_note: Based on your date of birth, the default bulugh age of 15 Hijri years gives:
onboarding.bulugh_default_explanation: This is the ruling of the majority of scholars (Hanafi, Shafi'i, Hanbali): if signs of puberty are not known, age 15 Hijri years is used.
onboarding.bulugh_hadith_note: The Prophet صلى الله عليه وسلم accepted Ibn ‘Umar's service at age 15 before the Battle of Khandaq (Sahih al-Bukhari 2664).
onboarding.bulugh_error_before_dob: Bulugh date cannot be before your date of birth
onboarding.bulugh_no_dob_hint: Please enter your date of birth first.
onboarding.bulugh_no_taklief: Based on this date, you are under 12 Hijri years old, which means Islamic obligations have not started for you yet. You can still proceed.
onboarding.revert_error_before_dob: Revert date cannot be before your date of birth
onboarding.periods_explainer: Add the periods when you were consistently performing all 5 prayers and fasting in Ramadan. Gaps between your bulugh date and these periods are where your qadaa comes from.
onboarding.periods_empty_hint: If you have never practiced consistently, your qadaa begins from your bulugh date.
onboarding.period_error_overlap: This period overlaps with an existing one
onboarding.period_error_before_revert: Practicing period cannot start before your reversion date
onboarding.period_error_before_dob: Practicing period cannot start before your date of birth
onboarding.period_error_end_before_start: End date cannot be before start date
onboarding.intention_subtitle: How many qadaa prayers per day?
onboarding.intention_explainer: This is just a guide for projections. There is no daily cap. Even one prayer a day is valid and valued.
onboarding.intention_scholar_note: Scholars emphasise sincerity and consistency over speed.
onboarding.projection_preview: At {{n}} prayers/day, your salah qadaa would take approximately {{years}} years.
onboarding.result_title: JazakAllahu khayran, you've taken the first step.
onboarding.result_subtitle: Based on your information, this is your current qadaa estimate.
onboarding.result_estimate_note: These numbers are there to guide your intention, not to overwhelm you.
onboarding.result_zero_title: Alhamdulillah, no qadaa is currently owed.
onboarding.result_zero_subtitle: Your record does not show any missed periods between bulugh and your practicing history.
onboarding.result_zero_debt: No debt found. May Allah accept your consistency!
onboarding.result_zero_hint: Your record shows no gaps between your bulugh date and your practicing periods.
onboarding.result_zero_continue: Keep protecting that consistency, and let the dashboard help you stay steady.
onboarding.result_projection: At {{n}} per day, you are on a steady path to completing your salah qadaa in about {{years}} years.
onboarding.result_encouragement: Sincere intention and steady consistency matter more than speed. Every single prayer counts.
onboarding.result_scholar_note: Scholars emphasise sincerity and consistency over speed. Even one qadaa prayer a day is meaningful and accepted.
onboarding.result_error: Could not calculate debt. You can continue and check your dashboard.
onboarding.error_invalid_date: Invalid date. Please check your input.
onboarding.error_date_before_min: This date is before the earliest allowed date.
onboarding.error_date_after_max: This date cannot be in the future.
onboarding.period_error_future_date: Practicing period cannot start in the future.

learn.no_results_hint: Try a broader keyword like bulugh, Ramadan, privacy, or qadaa.
learn.footer_note: This document is a living reference. All rulings and references should be verified with a qualified scholar.

demo.title: Sample user walkthrough
demo.subtitle: A believable, fully populated account showing how Awdah feels when someone is actively tracking profile details, practicing periods, prayers, fasts, history, and privacy tools.
demo.public_title: See how Awdah looks for a realistic sample user.
demo.public_subtitle: See what the app looks like with a fully populated sample account.
demo.public_panel_body: Browse a realistic sample account and explore every feature before signing up.
demo.data_source_note: Backed by a static JSON file so this page can be deployed on any static host without live application data.
demo.date_note: Every key date is shown in both Hijri and Gregorian formats to match the app's multilingual date experience.
demo.salah_subtitle: Remaining debt, recovery pace, and recent qadaa activity at a glance.
demo.sawm_subtitle: Missed Ramadan recovery, current mode, and today's fasting status.
demo.profile_subtitle: The core dates and profile details that shape this sample calculation.
demo.tracker_subtitle: Today's prayer state plus a weekly momentum snapshot.
demo.periods_subtitle: Practiced intervals that are excluded from qadaa calculations.
demo.history_subtitle: A mixed timeline of prayers, fasts, covered days, and period events.
demo.settings_subtitle: The privacy, export, and account controls available to this sample user.
demo.auth_managed_or_local: Works with managed or local auth
demo.hosting_value: The demo data ships with the frontend as JSON, so this route works on ordinary static hosting too.
